content:
Hi guys!

Here's a simple guide on how to use the GitHub Repository (I'll be moving this message to the <#1402537664619479103> part once I get my account back...)

It's really easy! We won't be using the more technical functions of GitHub for the time being. 
For now it's just functioning like a cooler google drive, but it's better than google drive in the sense that it keeps historical file versions better.

https://github.com/BIAVGit/Morimens-Localizations/tree/main

embeds.title: GitHub - BIAVGit/Morimens-Localizations
embeds.description: Contribute to BIAVGit/Morimens-Localizations development by creating an account on GitHub.

content: We'll collect volunteer contributed files on GitHub then compile them to be updated in-game before each version update.
